guide_lib.screen.codex.title: Codex
guide_lib.book.help.desc: How to use the Codex and mod manuals.
guide_lib.help.page.codex.p1:
Open the Codex item to browse every registered guide book.
Press Esc or « Back to close.
guide_lib.help.page.codex.p2:
Book theme: use ← / → or the footer links to turn pages.
Tablet theme: scroll the list with the mouse wheel.
Click ? in the footer anytime to reopen this help.
guide_lib.help.page.manual.p1:
Each mod can register a Manual recipe (written book).
Right-click the manual to open that mod's guide directly,
without going through the Codex list.
guide_lib.book.example.desc: Sample book shipped with Guide Lib. Copy this structure for your mod.
guide_lib.example.page.welcome.p1: Guide Lib lets content mods register in-game guide books using JSON only. Place files under data/<your_modid>/guide/<book_id>.json — no Java API or hard dependency required.
guide_lib.example.page.welcome.p2: Players open the Codex item to browse every registered book. Each mod can also craft a Manual that opens one book directly.
guide_lib.example.page.pages.text: Four page types are available: text (translation key or literal:...), crafting (recipe id), spotlight (item + text), and image (texture + optional caption). Long text is split automatically.
guide_lib.example.page.pages.spotlight: Spotlight pages show an item icon beside the description. Click recipe slots with JEI installed to view uses and recipes.
guide_lib.example.page.pages.image: Image pages display any registered texture (example: Codex Tablet screen texture).
guide_lib.example.page.codex.p1: Craft a Codex from a book and two paper. Upgrade to a Codex Tablet with redstone and a glass pane for a scrollable cyber UI theme.
